component.name: UniStream
component.summary: IPTV streaming application for Live TV, VOD and Series

description.p: UniStream is a multiplatform IPTV streaming application built with Flutter. Connect to your Xtream Codes provider to watch live TV channels, video on demand, and TV series with a modern, responsive interface.

ul.li: Live TV with EPG guide, catch-up replay, and quick channel zapping
Video on Demand with detail pages, resume playback, and ratings
TV Series with season/episode navigation and auto-play next
Multiple profiles with optional PIN protection
Cross-device sync via cloud (favorites, watchlist, watch progress)

description.p: Initial release with Live TV, VOD, Series, EPG guide, multi-profile support, and cross-device sync.
